_comment: MCP Server Configuration Template - Minimal (Phase 1-2 core: 3 servers)
_usage: Copy into ~/.claude.json under the 'mcpServers' key. Replace all <PLACEHOLDER> values with your actual credentials and paths. This is the minimum set needed to get started with PDF parsing and web search.

_placeholders.<YOUR_MINERU_API_KEY>: MinerU (OpenXLab) JWT token from https://mineru.openxlab.org.cn/ - sign up and generate an API key in your account settings
_placeholders.<YOUR_PDF_MCP_PATH>: Absolute path to pdf-mcp server.js entry point. Install: git clone https://github.com/angshuman/pdf-mcp.git into ~/.claude/mcp-servers/, then point to src/server.js, e.g. C:/Users/<you>/.claude/mcp-servers/pdf-mcp/src/server.js
_placeholders.<YOUR_ZHIPU_API_KEY>: ZhiPu (BigModel) API key from https://open.bigmodel.cn/ - register and create an API key in the console

_prerequisites.mineru-mcp: pip install mineru-mcp-server (or: pipx install mineru-mcp-server). The 'mineru-mcp-server' command must be on PATH.
_prerequisites.pdf-mcp: Requires Node.js 18+. Clone the pdf-mcp repo and run 'npm install' in its directory. The path in args must point to the built server.js.
_prerequisites.web-search-prime: No local install needed - this is a remote HTTP MCP server hosted by ZhiPu. Only requires a valid API key.
